title: OneBlockAtTime Barrel
description: This resource pack replaces the pumpkin on a barrel model, inspired by snapshot 22w13oneBlockAtATime. To see the changes, rename the pumpkin to "OneBlockAtTime Barrel".
body:
**Requires [OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads) or [CIT](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)**

This resource pack replaces the default pumpkin model with the barrel from snapshot 22w13oneBlockAtATime. Just rename the pumpkin to `OneBlockAtTime Barrel`
